get.description: Returns combined SNX circulating supply from L1 and L2.

403.description: You have been banned by WAF.

429.description: Too many requests, you're being rate-limited.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: (optional) The asset name for which return data for.

parameters.name: net
parameters.description: (optional) The asset name for which return data for.

get.description: Returns outstanding composition of Synthetix debt pool. If `key` query parameter is not provided it returns an array of objects (all assets). If `key` query parameter is provided it returns an object (with requested asset). If `net` query parameter is not provided it returns combined data for both networks. If `net` query parameter is provided it returns data for requested network.

get.summary: Retrieve TVL data for a specific network and time span.
get.description: Fetches Total Value Locked (TVL) data from the cache or PostgreSQL for the specified blockchain network and time span.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Name of the blockchain network (e.g., cross, ethereum, or optimism).

ts.description: The timestamp of the TVL data.

400.description: Invalid network or span specified in query parameters.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred when fetching data.
